programs.name: Spring Poetry Open
programs.description: A general poetry call for full-length and chapbook-length work.

programs.name: Flash Prose Prize
programs.description: Up to three flash prose pieces with a combined max of 2,000 words.

programs.name: Hybrid Folio Series
programs.description: Experimental, cross-genre, and visual-text projects for digital publication.

submissions.title: Field Notes for Winter Birds
submissions.coverLetter: These poems come from a larger manuscript centered on migration, caretaking, and the pressure points of Midwestern weather.
submissions.notes: Strong opening pages. Consider for second-round read.

submissions.title: Every Exit a Small Country
submissions.coverLetter: Three linked flash pieces that track a family during the last month before their motel is sold.

submissions.title: Annotated Constellation Map
submissions.coverLetter: This project braids diagrams, prose blocks, and footnotes about inheritance and astronomy.
